TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Vakangan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Genhe'I go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 140 buwan, 516 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 493 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 23 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun85%, Amis4%, Paywan2%, Cou1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Vakangan hya' ga Kainisungan. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Vakangan ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Vakangan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ *akaŋan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu ɣenħeʔi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun**%, amis~ɕ*%, pajwan*%, ʦ~ʨou*%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na *akaŋan ħjaʔ ɣa kainis~ɕuŋan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ *akaŋan ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ *akaŋan ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Vakangan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Genhe'I go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 140 buwan, 516 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 493 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 23 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun85%, Amis4%, Paywan2%, Cou1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Vakangan hya' ga Kainisungan. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Vakangan ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Vakangan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ *akaŋan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu ɣenħeʔi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun**%, amis~ɕ*%, pajwan*%, ʦ~ʨou*%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na *akaŋan ħjaʔ ɣa kainis~ɕuŋan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ *akaŋan ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ *akaŋan ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
